prompt: A dramatic vertical poster-style digital painting of Shenzhen, blending futuristic urban development with traditional culture at golden hour. At the top center, large expressive Chinese calligraphy reads 深圳 in textured gold brush strokes, with a small red seal stamp beside it. Directly below, a bold Chinese slogan reads 敢闯敢试，开放包容 in the same warm gold-white tone. The skyline is dominated by a tall, sleek central skyscraper resembling the Ping An Finance Centre, surrounded by dense modern high-rises under a vast painterly sky of deep stormy blue clouds opening into warm sunset light near the horizon. In the midground and right side, a modern port with exactly 4 red container cranes and stacked shipping containers emphasizes trade and industry. An elevated high-speed train curves from the bottom center toward the skyline, and the rail corridor glows with vivid neon-blue and white light trails that snake through the city in an elegant S-curve, suggesting speed, innovation, and connectivity. In the sky, exactly 11 quadcopter drones fly in loose formation, symbolizing technology and logistics. In the left foreground, include a historic Lingnan-style arcade building with ornate rooflines and warm interior lighting, contrasting old and new architecture. In the lower foreground, add dense greenery and blooming flowers, with especially vivid pink-red blossoms on the bottom right. Use a cinematic, aspirational, polished concept-art style with rich atmospheric perspective, ultra-detailed architecture, luminous highlights, subtle haze, and a blue-gold color palette. The composition should feel grand, optimistic, and visionary, like a tourism or city-branding propaganda poster celebrating innovation, openness, transportation, commerce, and heritage. Include a small white Chinese watermark at the bottom right reading 豆包AI生成.
